title: festuca macrathera
intro: Festuca macrathera, a species of flowering plant in the grass family, is also known as the red fescue. This perennial grass is widely distributed across various parts of the world and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. Festuca macrathera is used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to provide health benefits such as improving respiratory function and reducing oxidative stress.
